title: Echovoids
description: A mod overhauling The End dimension
body:
![banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c00fe1c6f9a603712f35c6911ea86ed8fa9533f9_0.webp)
# Echovoids
A mod that some new biomes and structures to the end and overhauls the dimension's visuals.
## Current features:
- 6 new end biomes
- 3 new wood types
- Updated vanilla end biomes
- Updated end dimension visuals
- New custom soundtrack for the dimension
- 2 new mobs
- A way to get wood and stone in the end
- A ton of new decorative blocks
- A new armor set and some new tools
- New functional blocks

## Dependencies:
- **Requires [Blueprint](https://modrinth.com/mod/blueprint)** for biome generation
- **Requires [Formations (Structure Library)](https://modrinth.com/mod/formations)** for structure generation

## Music
The mod comes with a new custom soundtrack added to the dimension, genirously provided by my friend and wonderful musician [**LudoCrypt**](https://ludocrypt.crd.co/) so go check out her [Bandcamp](https://ludocrypt.bandcamp.com/music)! The playlist of the mods soundtrack can also be found there.

![gay banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/fa4f7e2b8897c9c782d3139f120f00dd8aa73e72_0.webp)

And yes you can use the mod in modpacks and such AS LONG as there is no generative AI used in them anywhere :3
